projects.name: PocketCluster: Distributed Storage System Using Old Smartphones
projects.description: Built a distributed storage system using old smartphones as low-cost storage nodes. Implemented file chunking and replication for fault tolerance and reliability. Designed a central controller for metadata indexing, upload/download coordination, and node management.

projects.name: RAG-Powered Medical Agent (Hybrid Memory & Triage System)
projects.description: Built a medical conversational agent using RAG with short-term and long-term memory. Implemented semantic retrieval using embeddings and Pinecone vector database. Integrated speech processing and emotion-aware interaction, contributing to the emotion recognition model pipeline.

projects.name: Multi-Modal Image Recognition System
projects.description: Built a GUI-based computer vision system supporting object, face, and text recognition with real-time on-device inference. Integrated OpenCV pipelines with a lightweight Kivy interface; secured 2nd place in a hackathon for practical innovation.

projects.name: Smart Power Monitoring System
projects.description: Built a real-time IoT-based energy monitoring system using ESP32 to collect voltage and current data and transmit it to a local Flask server. Developed REST APIs and designed a MySQL database to store and process time-series energy data with peak usage tracking.

projects.name: Train Ticket Booking System
projects.description: Built a Python–MySQL based Train Ticket Booking System with an intuitive interface for booking, cancellation, and ticket management. Ensured fast and accurate ticket booking and cancellation with minimal user effort. Improved data reliability through structured MySQL database design and validation. Reduced manual errors by automating ticket and schedule management.

projects.name: Real-Time Hallucination Detection System
projects.description: Developing a Real-Time Hallucination Detection System to identify inaccurate or misleading AI-generated content. The project focuses on improving response reliability through model fine-tuning and optimized context generation. Successfully fine-tuned the base model to improve factual consistency. Resolved context generation issues to produce more relevant and coherent responses.

experience: at Innovature Labs (01/2026 - Present) — Focuses on full-stack development using Python and React with industry-standard practices. The internship emphasizes REST APIs, authentication, database management, and deployment.

at Stybay (06/2025 - Present) — AI-powered shopping and fashion discovery platform. Built an optimized web scraper to extract product details from Myntra, Ajio, and Flipkart using Python, Selenium, and BeautifulSoup. Developed RESTful APIs with Flask to connect frontend with backend for search. Added anti-blocking, error handling, and testing, ensuring reliable and scalable data extraction.

at Digital University Kerala (05/2025 - 06/2025) — Developed a Python-based Active Directory security analyzer with IP and Privilege Analysis modules to identify risky logins and privilege misuse. Built an IP Analyzer using Windows Event Logs, RDP session data, and netstat to map user login locations and detect suspicious access. Designed risk classification logic to categorize AD accounts based on group memberships and security flags for access control auditing. Used BloodHound, PingCastle, ldap3, and pywinrm to analyze attack paths, assess domain health, and automate AD data collection.
